settings.content:
Our BioLux Peptide range is built to the same standard you’d expect from a high-end aesthetic clinic or medical practice.

This is a space for people who take ownership of their health, who see longevity, energy, body composition, and performance as daily choices, not accidents. Our range is crafted for the discerning, proactive individual who wants precise, medical-grade tools to match the intention they already bring to their lifestyle.

Trust is non negotiable. No grey import powders. Every product is compounded in a registered SA Pharmacy Council laboratory, with stability testing and doctor oversight built into the process. You know what you’re getting, why you’re using it, and how it fits into a bigger wellness strategy, no guesswork, no shortcuts.

Whether your focus is fat loss, anti-aging, gut health, recovery, immunity, or simply feeling and looking deeply well, you’ll find peptides and protocols here that respect your standards. This is not about chasing quick fixes; it’s about making considered, high-calibre choices for a body and life you’re actively designing.

settings.heading: Why choose us
settings.item_1_description:
Every order is based on a doctor-reviewed protocol, not generic “research use” products.
Compounded in a South African Pharmacy Council–registered lab with strict quality controls.
settings.item_2_description: Each pen arrives with simple, step-by-step instructions so you know exactly how to use it.
settings.item_3_title: Cold-chain handling you don’t have to think about
settings.item_3_description: Peptides are packed and transported in a controlled cold-chain system from lab to your door. Temperature-stable packaging and fast couriers help protect potency and reliability.

settings.content:
Cold Chain Integrity,
From Lab to You


Precision-compounded peptides require precise handling. Every order is protected through a verified cold chain process to maintain stability, potency and effectiveness.

Peptides are sensitive compounds that require controlled conditions to remain effective.

From the moment your protocol is prepared, it is stored, packaged and delivered within a carefully managed temperature range. Your order arrives in insulated, temperature-controlled packaging designed to preserve its integrity throughout transit.

So what you receive is exactly what was prescribed, stable, potent and ready to perform.

Medical-grade handling. No compromises.

settings.text: The Gold Standard in Peptide Delivery

settings.content:
Designed for precision, simplicity and consistency.

Your protocol is delivered using a pre calibrated peptide pen system, removing the complexity of traditional preparation and dosing.

This ensures:
- Accurate dosing every time
- Minimal preparation and handling
- Consistent delivery for optimal results

Whether you’re new to peptides or experienced, the system is designed to feel intuitive, controlled and easy to integrate into your routine.

This is peptide therapy, simplified.

settings.title: Everything You Need to Know About Peptides
settings.content: Clear, practical guidance to help you understand, choose and use peptides with confidence.

settings.label: Semaglutide
settings.title: Semaglutide – Switch off the food noise
settings.content:
Overview:
Semaglutide is designed for people who are doing “all the right things” but still feel controlled by cravings and portion sizes. By working on the same pathways your gut uses to signal fullness and blood sugar control, it helps you feel satisfied sooner and stay satisfied longer.

Ideal for you if:

  • You can’t stop thinking about food, snacking, or the next meal.
  • Your weight keeps yo-yoing despite constant effort.
  • You want medical-grade help with appetite and blood sugar control.

What it helps with:

  • Reduced cravings and lower urge to overeat.
  • More stable energy with fewer highs and crashes.
  • Steady, sustainable fat loss when combined with lifestyle changes.

If you’re ready to stop relying on pure willpower, Semaglutide gives you science-backed support to quiet the food noise and make weight loss feel possible again.

settings.label: Tirzepitide
settings.title: Tirzepitide – Big results for stubborn weight
settings.content:
Overview:
Tirzepitide is for people who need a serious shift in weight and metabolic health, not just a small tweak. It works on two powerful hormone pathways to help control appetite, improve glucose handling, and drive significant fat loss.

Ideal for you if:

  • You have a higher amount of weight to lose and nothing has moved the needle enough.
  • You’re worried about insulin resistance, pre-diabetes, or family history of diabetes.
  • You want a next-level option when standard weight loss approaches haven’t been enough.

What it helps with:

  • Strong appetite control and reduced food noise.
  • Better blood sugar management and fewer cravings.
  • Meaningful, measurable fat loss with a structured plan.

Closing line:If you’re done with half-measures and need a powerful medical-grade ally, Tirzepitide is built for high-impact change.

settings.label: NAD+
settings.title: NAD+ – Cellular energy for people who can’t afford to crash
settings.content:
Overview:
NAD+ supports the tiny engines inside your cells that power everything from focus to physical performance. It’s ideal for high-demand lives where burnout, brain fog, and “always tired” have become the norm.

Ideal for you if:

  • You live a high-output life and feel permanently undercharged.
  • Your brain feels slower or less sharp than it used to.
  • You want to support healthy aging and long-term cellular resilience.

What it helps with:

  • More consistent daily energy and mental clarity.
  • Better ability to handle long workdays or training blocks.
  • Support for healthy aging, recovery, and cellular repair.

Closing line:If caffeine isn’t cutting it and you want your energy to come from inside the cell, NAD+ is your go-to foundation.

settings.label: Glutathione
settings.title: Glutathione – Detox, defence and a clearer glow
settings.content:
Overview:
Glutathione is your body’s master antioxidant – the front line for neutralising oxidative stress and supporting detox pathways. It’s a strong choice if you care about liver health, immune support, and a clearer, fresher look.

Ideal for you if:

  • You feel puffy, inflamed, or generally “toxic” despite healthy habits.
  • Your skin looks dull or uneven and you want more radiance from within.
  • You place a high load on your liver from medications, alcohol, or modern life.

What it helps with:

  • Antioxidant defence and cellular protection.
  • Liver support and detox assistance.
  • A clearer, brighter overall appearance over time.

Closing line:If you want a clean, simple way to support detox and glow from the inside out, Glutathione is a smart single-product choice.

settings.label: BPC-157
settings.title: BPC-157 – Support for stubborn injuries and gut repair
settings.content:
Overview:
BPC-157 is used for supporting healing in tendons, ligaments, joints, and the gut. It’s well-suited to active people and anyone dealing with nagging injuries or gut discomfort that never fully settles.

Ideal for you if:

  • You have a chronic tendon or ligament issue that keeps flaring.
  • You’re managing joint pain that limits how you train or move.
  • You’re dealing with ongoing gut issues, bloating, or irritation.

What it helps with:

  • Support for connective tissue healing.
  • Reduced irritation around problem joints and soft tissues.
  • Support for gut lining integrity and comfort.

If you’re serious about giving your body targeted support to heal, BPC-157 is a focused, single-tool option you can build around.

settings.label: Ipamorelin
settings.title: Ipamorelin – Gentle growth hormone support for lean, athletic shape
settings.content:
Overview:
Ipamorelin helps your body release more of its own growth hormone in a controlled, targeted way. It’s designed for recovery and body composition, not extreme bulking.

Ideal for you if:

  • You train regularly and want better recovery, sleep, and shape.
  • You’re looking for a softer, more natural-feeling GH support.
  • You’re more interested in leanness and tone than size.

What it helps with:

  • Recovery between training sessions.
  • Support for lean muscle and fat loss over time.
  • Deeper, more restorative sleep.

If you want to nudge your body toward a leaner, better-recovered version of you, Ipamorelin is a strong standalone choice.

settings.label: CJC-1295 (No DAC)
settings.title: CJC-1295 (No DAC) – Night-time repair and slow, steady recomposition
settings.content:
Overview:
CJC-1295 (No DAC) is designed to enhance natural growth hormone pulses, especially around sleep. It’s ideal if you care about deep recovery, better sleep quality, and gradual body recomposition.

Ideal for you if:

  • You wake up tired even after a full night in bed.
  • Your progress in the gym or on the scale has stalled.
  • You want subtle, long-term shifts rather than harsh changes.

What it helps with:

  • Support for deeper, more restorative sleep.
  • Recovery from training and daily wear and tear.
  • Gradual improvements in body composition.

If you see sleep as your biggest untapped performance tool, CJC-1295 (No DAC) is a smart solo pick.
